content:
# Session 90 ‚Äî review of iter-090

## Metadata
- Iter/session: 090. Route: v4.31.0 toolchain-bump migration recovery, file #2 (upstream ROOT).
- Lane: SOLO `prove` on `AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/TensorObjSubstrate.lean`.
- **sorry (this file): 5 ‚Üí 1.** 14 edits, 1 `.lean` file. `lake build ‚Ä¶TensorObjSubstrate` **EXIT 0**.
- Closed decls all **axiom-clean** (`#print axioms` = `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`, no `sorryAx`).
- Build authority = `lake build` EXIT 0 + `lake env lean` `#print axioms` on warm olean. LSP was UNUSABLE
  on this file (broken-pipe / worker death on the 3.2M-HB lemmas ‚Äî confirmed in attempts_raw L62/64/66);
  goal diagnosis done via `trace_state` injected into the build.

## Targets

### #1 `tensorObj_unit_iso` (L284) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
- Attempt 1 (paste in-comment term `(sheafification).mapIso (Œª_ (ùüô_ ‚Ä¶)) ‚â™‚â´ counit.app unit`): FAILED
  `L296 Application type mismatch` ‚Äî `Œª_ (ùüô_ ‚Ä¶)` has type `ùüô_ ‚äó ùüô_ ‚âÖ ùüô_`, but `mapIso` now needs
  `Monoidal.tensorObj unit.val unit.val ‚âÖ ?` and the *second* slot defeq `unit.val ‚â° ùüô_` is rejected.
- Fix (NEW v4.31 **axis 7**): `(PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategoryStruct ‚Ä¶).leftUnitor unit.val` (the
  spelling sibling `tensorObj_left_unitor` uses) keeps the un-unitored slot literal `.val`, leaving only
  the first-slot `unit.val ‚â° ùüô_` defeq (holds). Mathematically the same (left unitor at the unit).

### #2 `tensorObj_restrict_iso` Œ±-`naturality` (L455) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean
- One token, iter-089 pattern axis #1 verbatim: `naturality := fun _ _ i => f.appIso_inv_naturality i`.

### #3 `sheafificationCompPullback_comp` (L2589/L2600) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean (heavy)
- Ported parent-`main`'s `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_natTrans` body into the `key` NatTrans cocycle
  (three-instance `Adjunction.leftAdjointCompNatTrans_assoc` mate calculus; `sheafifyIdOf` defeq abbrev);
  consumed by `NatTrans.congr_app key P`. Deps confirmed in Mathlib v4.31 (`Adjunction/CompositionIso`,
  `Adjunction/Mates`, `conjugateEquiv_symm_id`).
- 2 v4.31 drift fixes in the ported tail (diagnosed via build `trace_state`): (1) `dsimp only
  [Functor.comp_obj]` now a no-op ‚Üí guard `try`; (2) **axis 8** ‚Äî `simp only [Category.id_comp]` misses
  the leading `ùüô _ ‚â´` at a `Functor.obj` spelling, so `rw [‚Üê e2]` looked for `ùüô _ ‚â´ X023` vs bare `X023`.
  Fix: `erw [Category.id_comp] at e2`/`e3` FIRST, then `rw [‚Üê e2] at e1; rw [e3] at e1; exact
  (Iso.eq_inv_comp ‚Ä¶).mpr e1`.

### #4 `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` (D3‚Ä≤, L2670/L3358) ‚Äî SOLVED, axiom-clean (large port, ~1030 LOC)
- The post-split file had ONLY opener+sorry; the full body + its **15 helper lemmas were absent**. Ported
  the entire helper block + lemma body from parent-`main` (L2954‚Äì3985): privates `comp_cancel_mid`,
  `comp_slide_nested`, `comp_cancel_three_lr`, `comp_slide_three`, `map_comp_slide`, `map_comp4_eq_comp5`,
  `tensorHom_collapse_3_4`, `adj_unit_map_counit`, `comp_forget_cocycle`, `inv_telescope`,
  `cocycle_assemble`, `sheafifyMap_pullbackComp_hom_inv_id`, `sheafifyMap_Œ¥comp_split`,
  `sheafificationCompPullback_comp_inv`, plus PUBLIC `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` (`lem:pullback_val_iso_comp`).
  Frozen signatures already matched. Auditor confirmed all 14 helpers correct as Lean.
- Only 2 drift sites in the whole port, both in `pullbackValIso_comp_leg`'s `hUZ1`/`hUZ2` (NEW v4.31
  **axis 9**): `simpa ‚Ä¶ using ‚Ä¶unit.naturality` closes with *reducible*-transparency `isDefEq`, which no
  longer bridges the `Functor.comp.obj` spelling nor the `toRingCatSheafHom (h‚â´f) = œÜf ‚â´ whiskerLeft œÜh`
  reconciliation (a `def`-rfl). `respectTransparency false` and adding `Functor.comp_obj` to the simp set
  did NOT help (gap is in the type annotation). Fix: `have hnat := ‚Ä¶; simp only [...] at hnat; exact hnat`
  ‚Äî bare `exact` uses default-transparency `isDefEq` which sees through both.

### #5 `private exists_tensorObj_inverse` (L716, sorry L738) ‚Äî LEFT IN PLACE (stale dup, per directive)
- Investigated per objective. **Verdict: unconsumed stale duplicate ‚Üí deletion candidate.** The `private`
  copy has ZERO in-file term consumers (only docstring mentions L44/137/221/565/578/703). The consumed
  PUBLIC twin (`RelPicFunctor.lean` L360‚Äì450) lives in `TensorObjInverse.lean:1971`. Directive explicitly
  directs NOT to grind it. Sorry left untouched; reported as deletion candidate.
- CAVEAT (lvb-checker): the public twin in `TensorObjInverse.lean:1971` is itself still v4.31-`sorry`'d, so
  the LIVE math obligation persists downstream ‚Äî deleting the private dup does not resolve it.

## NEW v4.31.0 fix axes (beyond the iter-089 6-axis pattern)
- **Axis 7** (unit-object `mapIso` slot defeq): sheafifying a unitor that lands `ùüô_` in a tensor slot ‚Üí
  prefer `monoidalCategoryStruct.leftUnitor M.val` over `Œª_ (ùüô_ ‚Ä¶)` (keeps literal `.val` in the other slot).
- **Axis 8** (`simp only [Category.id_comp]` misses `ùüô` at `Functor.obj` spelling): clear with
  `erw [Category.id_comp]`; then `rw [‚Üê h]` matches the now-bare composite.
- **Axis 9** (`simpa ‚Ä¶ using` reducible-transparency fails on `comp_obj`/`def`-rfl reconciliation): replace
  `simpa only [L] using e` with `have h := e; simp only [L] at h; exact h`. The `respectTransparency false`
  knob does NOT fix `simpa` here.

## Review-subagent findings (both 0 must-fix)
- **lean-auditor** `iter090`: 0 crit / 4 major / 5 minor ‚Äî `task_results/lean-auditor-iter090.md`. All 14
  ported helpers verified correct as Lean; no suspect bodies, no excuse-comments, no axioms. Majors are all
  stale-comment / within-project-duplication maintenance issues (see recommendations).
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** `tensorobjsubstrate-iter090`: FAITHFUL, 0 must-fix / 2 major / 1 minor
  cluster ‚Äî `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-tensorobjsubstrate-iter090.md`. Core API fully covered;
  `pullbackValIso_comp_leg` IS covered. Gaps: `isInvertible_unit` (substantive public, phantom label
  `lem:isinvertible_unit` ‚Äî major) and vestigial `pullback_lan_decomposition` dangling `\ref` (minor).

## LOW notes
- `try dsimp` guard at L2820 is a harmless v4.31 forward-compat no-op (auditor minor).
- Historical `-- ITER-NNN` roadmap comment blocks inside `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` increase read load
  (style only, project convention retains history).

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- None. `sync_leanok` ran (iter 90, +58/‚àí0 on `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, sha 6a28571) ‚Äî correct given
  the 4 newly-closed proofs. No `\mathlibok` warranted (ported helpers are project proofs, not Mathlib
  re-exports). No `\lean{}` renames (prover used the frozen names). No stale `\notready` found.

## Headline
Decisive recovery on the upstream ROOT: 4 of 5 regressed proofs closed axiom-clean (incl. a 1030-LOC port),
file builds EXIT 0, sole remaining sorry is a confirmed-dead private duplicate. Root is **frozen-green** for
the downstream serialization (`TensorObjInverse.lean`, 19 sorries ‚Äî the next + bulkiest recovery lane).
